scripts.audit: npm run audit:ts && npm run audit:shell
scripts.audit:ts: biome check src/ web/src/ && tsc --noEmit && tsc --noEmit -p web/tsconfig.json && knip --config knip.json --include files,dependencies,unlisted --exclude binaries --no-config-hints && knip --directory web --config knip.json --include files,dependencies,unlisted --exclude binaries --no-config-hints
scripts.audit:ts:fix: biome check --fix src/ web/src/ && pnpm run audit:ts
scripts.audit:shell: find .autonoma -type f \( -name '*.sh' -o -path '.autonoma/bin/autonoma-up' -o -path '.autonoma/bin/autonoma-wa' \) -print0 | xargs -0 -n1 bash -n && node --check .autonoma/install.mjs && node --check .autonoma/uninstall.mjs
